hero_title: Vidarbha and Marathwada Dairy Development Project
hero_subtitle: Empowering dairy farmers across 19 districts, 192 talukas, and 24,657 villages. Apply for scheme benefits and track your application status online.
stats_subtitle: Track the progress of VMDDP scheme applications across Vidarbha and Marathwada regions
about_subtitle: A comprehensive initiative by the Government of Maharashtra and National Dairy Development Board (NDDB) to strengthen dairy infrastructure and support farmers across 19 districts in Vidarbha and Marathwada regions.
about_mission_desc: To build robust dairy infrastructure and empower farmers through financial assistance, modern technology, and comprehensive veterinary support across Vidarbha and Marathwada regions.
about_vision_desc: To establish Vidarbha and Marathwada as self-reliant dairy hubs with sustainable livelihoods, ensuring economic prosperity and food security for farming families.
about_values_desc: Transparency in operations, farmer-first approach, efficient service delivery, fair resource distribution, and commitment to sustainable dairy development.
about_highlights: Joint initiative of Government of Maharashtra and NDDB
Coverage across 19 districts, 192 talukas, and 24,657 villages
Modern dairy infrastructure and equipment support
Digital application platform with transparent workflow
Direct financial assistance to farmers' accounts
Quality breeding stock and veterinary care support
Capacity building through farmer training programs
Real-time application tracking and status monitoring
Fair and equitable resource allocation system
scheme_components_subtitle: Explore our comprehensive range of dairy development schemes designed to support farmers at every stage
scheme_animal_induction_desc: Financial assistance for purchasing high-yielding calved indigenous or crossbred dairy cows
scheme_hgm_desc: High Genetic Merit pregnant cow support for enhanced dairy productivity and breeding excellence
scheme_hgm_benefits: Financial aid for HGM pregnant cow acquisition
scheme_fertility_feed_desc: Specialized nutritional supplements to improve reproductive health and fertility in dairy animals
scheme_fodder_seed_desc: Quality fodder seed distribution for green and dry fodder cultivation to ensure year-round feed availability
scheme_snf_enhancer_desc: Solids-Not-Fat enhancer supplements to improve milk quality and increase farmer income
scheme_snf_enhancer_benefits: Better price realization for quality milk
scheme_chaff_cutter_desc: Mechanized chaff cutting equipment to process fodder efficiently and reduce labor
scheme_silage_desc: Provision of quality silage for round-the-year nutritious fodder availability
scheme_infertile_treatment_desc: Comprehensive veterinary treatment program for infertile animals to restore productivity
scheme_training_desc: Capacity building programs on modern dairy management, animal health, and best practices
authorities_subtitle: Meet the leadership team dedicated to implementing and managing the VMDDP scheme
footer_description: Empowering dairy farmers across Vidarbha and Marathwada regions through comprehensive scheme support and digital transparency.
footer_address:

track_subtitle: Enter your mobile number or application ID to check the current status of your VMDDP scheme application
beneficiaries_subtitle: View district and component-wise application status for complete transparency
gallery_subtitle: Visual documentation of VMDDP implementation, events, and success stories
gallery_farmer_training_desc: Capacity building and skill development sessions
